name: The Chikuho Bank, Ltd.
summary: The Chikuho Bank, Ltd. provides various banking products and services to individual and corporate customers in Japan. The company offers deposits, certificates of deposits, loans, financing, fund management, and management support services. As of September 30, 2020, it operated 44 branches. The company was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Kurume, Japan.
